source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.  
Question: For the two-port network shown in the figure, the Z-matrix is given by  
**Choices:**  
A. \(\begin{bmatrix} Z_1 & Z_1 + Z_2 \\ Z_1 + Z_2 & Z_2 \end{bmatrix}\)  
B. \(\begin{bmatrix} Z_1 & Z_1 \\ Z_1 + Z_2 & Z_2 \end{bmatrix}\)  
C. \(\begin{bmatrix} Z_1 & Z_2 \\ Z_2 & Z_1 + Z_2 \end{bmatrix}\)  
D. \(\begin{bmatrix} Z_1 & Z_1 \\ Z_1 & Z_1 + Z_2 \end{bmatrix}\)
